2090.name: Grasslands
2090.description: You move through a vast sea of yellow grass, your legs lost below the surface as you trudge onward. The bright blue sky overhead is devoid of clouds, and the only sound you hear is the rustling of the wind in the grass. To the east, a huge tree bursts from the plains; far to the west, you see the beginnings of a forest. You can travel in any direction.

2187.name: Grasslands
2187.description: The ancient wall of Oldgate rises to your north. Time has pried away several huge blocks of grey stone and driven them deep into the surrounding soil. Knee- high grasses cover the ground, encircling these broken remnants of civilization like vultures waiting patiently for the final throes of death. You can travel west along the wall or east or south into the open prairie.

2092.name: Grasslands
2092.description: The grass here deepens from the golden hue visible to the north to a darker, earthier brown. The webs of giant spiders dot the area, and you note the peculiar absence of small rodents. The land to the west is dotted with small trees; other directions boast only yellow grass and an occasional nehva tree. You can head across the grasslands north, east or west and a beaten path leads south.

2188.name: Grasslands
2188.description: Just to the northwest lies the ancient city of Oldgate. From where you stand amidst the dry grass of the prairie, you can see nearly all of the eastern and southern walls of the city. Quite close to you, the two walls of grey stone meet beneath a high watchtower, which remains intact despite its age and long abandonment. The eastern wall stretches away toward the crumbled northeastern tower, while the southern wall breaks at a surtower and gate. You can travel north, east, or west through the grasses. Swallowing its fear, the grass spider swings at your arm. (8) You stumble and lose your grip.

2189.name: Near Oldgate
2189.description: The grey stone wall of Oldgate rises just west of here, but only silence walks the parapet. The southeastern watchtower rises several meters above the wall to command a view of the lush prairie on which you travel, surrounded by tree-- breaks the surface to the east, remaining motionless as the grass rolls and heaves around it. The grass continues to the north, east, and south. The giant weasel misses you. You knock the giant weasel backwards. (26) The ocean's energy begins to flow through you, granting you the speed of a gentle current.

2191.name: Grasslands
2191.description: Tall yellow grass surrounds you, tickling your elbows and filling your boots with burrs. The smooth golden plain stretches away to the south, broken here and there by the broad, mushroom-shaped tops of nehva trees. A slight western breeze blows the grass into waves, reminding you of the sea. A small hill rising just north of here bounds the prairie but has succumbed to the incessant march of the grass. All directions lie open.

2096.name: Grasslands
2096.description: You come upon the remains of an old bahtzen cow. Judging from the corpse and the amount of spoor in the vicinity, you surmise that the cow fell to a pack of swift carnivores. The eternal yellow grasses around you tell nothing more of the life or death of the beast at your feet. An ancient nehva tree rises to the east, its vast green canopy of branches mottled with streaks of brown. You can head toward the tree or continue through the grass to the north or west.

2097.name: Beneath a Nehva Tree
2097.description: You rest in the shade of an ancient nehva, its thick boughs towering far above the grasslands. Fire has deeply scarred one side of the trunk, burning away the bark and opening a hole into the hollow root system below. Deprived of water by this damage, numerous branches have died, mottling the green canopy above you with patches of brown and red. The prairie continues to the east and west.

2098.name: Grasslands
2098.description: The song of an unseen bird lightens your mood as you continue your passage through the grasslands. A light wind from the west blows gently upon you and bends down the grass in your path. Above you, the blue dome of the sky holds not a cloud. The grasslands extend north, east and west. In the last direction, you see the mottled cap of a nehva tree. A beaten path leads through the grasses to the southwest.

2192.name: Grasslands
2192.description: As you make your way through the high grasses, you come across a web of fine silk spread across several meters. The sticky strands of the web twine through and above the grass, threatening to catch and bind you. Soft noises of motion from the grass become frequent as you travel, but you see no trace of fauna other than the web. Travel to the north is blocked by a steep hillside, but you can move east, south, or west across the level plains.

2548.name: Beneath a Nehva Tree
2548.description: A large nehva tree towers above the plains around you. The grass in the tree's shadow has been trampled flat, and at least a dozen narrow paths cut through the grass at the edge of the clearing. One region of the grass is marked with large drops of dried blood, and you find several fresh carnivore spoor in the eastern section. You can travel north or south.

n.to_room_name: Southern Slopes of the River Valley

2193.name: Grasslands
2193.description: A network of narrow paths breaks the uniformity of this section of the plains. Each path is well trampled, but too narrow to be of much use to someone of your size. You occasionally stumble onto the spoor of a large carnivore near an intersection of paths. A hill climbs swiftly to the north, and the plains continue to the east, south, and west. Bracing itself, the grass spider lands a glancing blow on you. (4) Like a tiger, you stab the grass spider's body! (21) The ocean's energy begins to flow through you, granting you the speed of a gentle current.

2194.name: Grasslands
2194.description: A handful of narrow paths cut through the grass here, weaving long, meandering courses across the plains. Great birds of prey circle high above a hill to the north, and you once see several dive at once to attack something on the ridge. You can travel over the grassy land to the east, south, or west. You have lost 144 experience.

2195.name: Grasslands
2195.description: You stand in an area of trampled grass around a gaping hole in the earth. Roughly two meters in diameter on the outside, the hole opens into a tunnel that quickly narrows to only half that size. The spoor of some vicious beast is strewn about the area, mixed with the bloody remains of several small animals-- or one large animal shredded into small parts. The grasslands continue to the east, south, and west.

go hole.to_zone: Labyrinth of Burrows - Labyrinth of Burrows

2190.name: Near Oldgate
2190.description: You plow your way through the tall, yellow grasses of the prairie. To the west, a high wall of grey stone shadows the land and marks the boundary of the ancient city of Oldgate. The abandoned northeastern watchtower has crumbled over time, leaving only a few odd stones jutting from the upper edge of the wall. A steep, grass-covered ridge to the north prevents travel in that direction, but the land lies open to the east and south.
